queries.question: Which features do all green buildings have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Features.name  from Green_Buildings_Features join Features on Green_Buildings_Features.feature_id = Features.feature_id join Green_Buildings on Green_Buildings_Features.green_building_id = Green_Buildings.id   GROUP BY Green_Buildings_Features.feature_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Green_Buildings_Features.green_building_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Green_Buildings)

queries.question: For every green building, show the features that they have.
queries.sql: select green_buildings.address , features.name from Green_Buildings_Features join Features on Green_Buildings_Features.feature_id = Features.feature_id join Green_Buildings on Green_Buildings_Features.green_building_id = Green_Buildings.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?address ?name WHERE {
  ?green_buildings_features a :Green_Buildings_Features .
  ?features a :Features .
  ?green_buildings_features p:hasFeatures ?features .
  ?green_buildings a :Green_Buildings .
  ?green_buildings_features p:hasGreen_Buildings ?green_buildings .
  ?green_buildings p:address ?address .
  ?features p:name ?name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the features for each green building.
